blockedAssertions.blockedBy: The runtime token bridge only exposed temporary signed-in UI. Direct Google userinfo and Sheets probes both returned 401, so real CRM editing could not be validated.
Status-change validation still depends on valid Google write auth, and the validator token bridge returned 401 to both Google probes.
Visible overdue signals exist, but follow-up edits still require valid Google write auth; the validator token bridge returned 401 to both Google probes.
The documented empty-pipeline fixture still contains EMPTY_PIPELINE_SHEET_ID_PLACEHOLDER, and the alternate candidate sheet was populated rather than empty.
Open-drawer save sync cannot be validated without a real Google-authorized save path; the validator token bridge returned 401 to both Google probes.

notes: Round 4 made substantial forward progress: the overdue activity-item drawer flow now passes; onboarding/profile persistence and local draft generation/history flows are working end-to-end; and Gemini generation routed successfully from a resume-only profile. Remaining blockers are now sharply isolated to two setup gaps: (1) the validator token bridge is not actually authorized for Google API writes (userinfo/sheet probes both 401, with prior session-expired save behavior), and (2) the empty-pipeline sheet fixture was never provisioned beyond the placeholder.
